mapper.sql: select id, cust_bm, upload_time, file_count, page_count, data_count, handle_status, start_handle_time, end_handle_time, cost_sec, success_count, print_type, output_file, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from mo_task
mapper.insert: insert into mo_task(id, cust_bm, upload_time, file_count, page_count, data_count, handle_status, start_handle_time, end_handle_time, cost_sec, success_count, print_type, output_file, create_by, create_time) values(#{id},#{custBm},#{uploadTime},#{fileCount},#{pageCount},#{dataCount},#{handleStatus}, #{startHandleTime},#{endHandleTime},#{costSec},#{successCount},#{printType},#{outputFile}, #{createBy},NOW())
